titleStmt.title: SII 26.750: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 750. (A.R. No. 699 of 1909.) TUṞAIYŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of land, by the king as tax-free dēvadāna, in Tuṟaiyūr in Irā[ja]rā[ja]-vaḷanāḍu to the temple of the god Ulaguyyavanda chōḷīśvaram-uḍaiyār built at the place by Śembiyaṉ Virāṭarāyaṉ of Veḷḷūr. It is stated that the land belonged to the same donor. A number of officials figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī 10000 2 1000 5 100 4 10 6l tribhuvaṉaccakravatti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Irācarācavaḷanāṭṭu tuṟaiyūril veḷḷūruṭaiyāṉ cem
piyaṉ virāṭarāyan Eḻu(n)n=taruḷuvitta Ulakuyyavantacoḷiśvaramuṭaiyār koyil tevarkanmikkum śrīmā
kecurakkaṅkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum Ittevaṟkut tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka Ivvūril Ivan kāṇiyāna nilattu
tanta nilam Oṉṟaraiyile śrīkoyilum tirumaṭaiviḷākamum tirttak kuḷamum Uḷḷiṭṭaṉavaiyiṟṟukku Arai
nilam Irupattiraṇṭāvatu mutal niṅkalāka nikkavum nikki niṉṟa nilamum Ivvūril Ivaṉ kāṇiyāna nilattile muṉṟa
rai nilamum Āka nālarai nilam yivvāṇṭu mutal tevatāṉam Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭavum kaṭavutākap pe
ṟaveṇum Eṉṟu kāliṅkarāyan namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi Iṭak ka
ṭavatākac coṉṉom Innilam vatumutal Ippaṭi niṅkalum tevatā
na yiṟaiyiliyāka kaikkoṇṭu Aṉupavikka nti volai miṉavaṉ muventave
ḷār Ivai kāṅkaiyarāyan Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai cetiyarāyar Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai kāliṅkarāyan
Eḻuttenṟum Ivai kurukularāyan Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai Ilaṅkecuran Eḻutteṉṟum
Ivai viḻuppātarāyan Eḻutteṉṟum yāṇṭu Irupattiraṇṭāvatu 2 10 829l
Digital edition of SII 26.750 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
